resume_text: Full Stack Developer with 4 years of experience. Currently at Digital Agency LLC building web applications with React and Node.js. Previously interned at BigTech Co. Experience with Python (Django), JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, and basic AWS usage. Built an internal dashboard serving 500 daily users. MSc Computer Science from Tech University (2020). Interested in transitioning to more backend-focused roles. Familiar with machine learning concepts through online courses.
